messages.content: ok so moms birthday is april 26
shes turning 55 and i want to do a surprise dinner
bro we gotta make this big
trevor u handle the family guest list. reach out to aunts uncles whoever
bryce can u look into venues downtown
bet ill start reaching out tmrw 💯
setting up a notion page to track everything
nobody say anything to mom obviously
walked the farmhouse tap and grill today
they got a private room in the back, fits 30
still gotta hear back from uncle ray and aunt pat
trevor ur bringing the cake right
already ordered bro 🎂 picking up at 4
im getting there at 5 to set up decorations and the slideshow
this is gonna be so fire 🔥🔥
everyone bring mom at 6:30. tell her its just a family dinner
the one with teh built in screen??
yeah draw directly on the display
b&h had it 100 off so i pulled the trigger
dude ur process vids are gonna be nuts with that
drawing on the actual screen vs looking up at the monitor is huge
u should do an unboxing vid
ppl eat that stuff up on tiktok
gonna redo my whole desk setup for it tho
send pics when u get it set up 🚀
yo so im starting a 30 day art challenge on tiktok
wait fr?? like a new piece every day
thats what im thinking. different prompt every day
how many followers u at rn
nah fr use trending sounds too thats what blows stuff up 👀
yeah already planned it out. got a whole notion page for it
yo been thinking about the fees
free tier with transaction fee, paid tiers lower fee
yeah thats what im thinking too
like 5 min from signup to first listing live
what if they could import from redbubble
connect account and we pull their designs in 👀
need to check their api tho
bro this is gonna be fire
lol chill we still got a ton to figure out
nah im tellin u the vibes are right 💯
bet ill look into marketing angles tmrw
bro how many followers u at now
the wolf one from day 4. got like 47k views somehow
i saw that one the coloring part was insane 👀
ngl u might actually build somethin with this
yeah im halfway thru. 15 days down
u gotta keep going after the 30 days
thats the plan probably. ppl keep asking for more
yo so i got confirmed aunt linda uncle james aunt pat uncle ray is a maybe
cousin maya is in shes driving up from montpelier
oh ya mrs carson said theyd love to come
her and mr carson plus their daughter
ok so thats like 12 on ur side
ill send u the full list with emails tonight
i got about 8 from moms friend circle
nice so were looking at like 20-25 total?
bro this is gonna be so good
they changed their commission structure again
lowered base commission to like 10% on most products 💀
that used to be way higher right
ya it was like 15-20% depending on teh product
dude this is a huge opportunity for us
if artists are looking for alternatives we need to be ready
we need to move faster on this
updating the competitor analysis in airtable rn
also theres a whole reddit thread of artists saying they want somewhere new to go
r/artbusiness had like 300 comments on it
we gotta time our launch right
strike while the iron is hot u know 💰
lets push the mvp timeline up if we can
yo trev u free next saturday
havent been out there since last summer 🔥
i know right. was thinking oakledge early morning
do u need to renew ur license
ill bring the cooler and rods
bet im bringing the kayak too
yeah just got the roof rack on last week
we can paddle out if teh shore spots suck
ok so oakledge 6am. leaving my place at 530

oh also completely different topic lol. my buddy jake does frontend dev and i was telling him about our marketplace idea. hes super interested in helping build it out. should i give him ur hargrove email so he can reach out?
cintiq 16. finally got it set up
the one u draw on the screen?
night and day from the old one
about to do a test piece
yo so heads up moved some stuff around this weekend
thing i had for sunday got pushed to monday
personal stuff. had a conflict come up
just the other stuff had to move
honestly this month is insane with scheduling
also thinking about blocking off the 22nd
still figuring it out. might need the whole day
lot going on this month man
ya theres this guy derek does private events
did my cousins wedding. was solid
yeah see if hes free apr 26
hes available. 400 flat includes speakers and setup
finally got the desk set up
govee strip behind the desk. changes colors from my phone
and got the monitor on an arm so theres actually desk space now
right? cintiq actually has room now
yea monitor arm was 30 and the leds 25. amazon prime
might do one for tiktok lol desk setups do numbers
yo heads up ran into your mom at price chopper and she asked what weve been up to on saturdays. i just said hanging out but she seemed kinda curious lol. what should i say if she asks again
hey so im thinking about the garden this year
Oh that would be wonderful! I've been looking forward to spring planting.
yeah was looking at what grows in zone 4b
Can we do tomatoes this year? And basil! Caprese salads all summer 😊
yeah definitely. cherry tomatoes romas and basil
also peppers lettuce and some herbs
That sounds lovely. Let me know if you need anything from the store. ❤️
nah gonna order from gardeners supply. ill plan it out tonight
just ordered the seeds btw. should be here around april 1
Perfect! Can't wait to get started. 😊
Oh wonderful! What all did you end up getting?
tomatoes basil peppers lettuce parsley plus soil and a seed tray
When do we start planting? I'll clear the kitchen windowsill. 🙏
this weekend. tomatoes and peppers gotta start inside first
Hi sweetheart! I have a favor to ask. The library is hosting a children’s reading event on April 15th and I volunteered to help organize. Would you be able to design a flyer for it? 😊
yeah of course whats the event
It's a read-aloud morning for kids ages 4 to 8. We're calling it Storytime at the Lake. Three guest readers, some crafts, and light snacks afterward.
cute. when do u need it by
The sooner the better! We want to start posting them around town next week. Is a couple days too fast?
nah i can get u a draft by friday. do u have a logo or anything from the library
I'll ask Janet tomorrow. She's the events coordinator and should have one for the kids programming.
cool send it over when u get it
Good news! Janet sent me the library logo this morning. I'm emailing it to you now.
got it ill work on it tonight
just emailed u the flyer draft lmk what u think
Marcus I just looked at the flyer you emailed! It's beautiful. The colors are perfect.
Just a couple small things. Can you change April 15 to say Wednesday, April 15th and add the library phone number? It's (802) 555-0920.
Oh and Janet said the start time should be 10 AM not 10:30. Sorry about that!
no worries ill fix it tonight
just sent the final flyer to janet. cc'd u on it
Wonderful! I can't wait for the event. Thank you for doing this sweetheart. 🙏
Marcus, the little tomato seedlings are sprouting! Come see when you're home. 😊
Yes! Three of them have popped up. They're tiny.
thats awesome. i think we transplant outside mid may after last frost
Memorial Day weekend has always been the safe bet around here. I can't wait! ❤️
my allergies are so bad rn
Oh no, sweetheart. Did you take anything?
ran out of claritin like a week ago
Marcus! You need to stay on top of that. Order some tonight please.
yeah im doing a cvs order rn
Get the nasal spray too. The Flonase really helped you last year.
Good. The pollen has been terrible this week. 🙏
Don't forget your allergy meds today sweetheart
Good! Hope they help. Your eyes were so red yesterday. 😊
Are your allergies any better? You were sneezing all through dinner last night.
a little. claritin is helping but the pollen is wild
I saw on the weather channel that Vermont is having one of the worst pollen seasons in years.
How are the allergies doing? You seem less sneezy the last couple days.
yeah way better this week actually
I was talking to Linda at the library today and she swears by local honey for allergies. She says if you eat honey made from local pollen it helps build up your immunity over time.
lol idk if thats actually real mom
Well it can't hurt to try! The farmers market on Saturday has that Vermont Bee Company stand. You should pick some up.
ok ok ill check it out

Hi sweetheart, Dr. Patel's office left a voicemail on the house phone. Something about scheduling your next quarterly bloodwork? Want me to call them back and set it up for you? I know you're busy with work this week.
yo playoffs start saturday whos in for game 1
rjs on church st. big screens and good food
game is at noon so get there by 11:30 to grab a table
in 4 bro this team is different
bro that 3rd quarter run was insane
game 3 is saturday. rjs again or switch it up
bryce u still got that projector
oh the one from college?? that thing was sick
ok bryces place for game 3 then. everyone bring something
ill get wings from that spot on pine st
im grabbing chips and stuff. game starts at 7:30 so come by 6:30
yooo that was a statement game
round 2 starts sunday. back to rjs?
yo game night at my place sunday whos in
ill order snacks on instacart. just bring urselves
ok tmrw still good for everyone?
we're good. mind if natalie comes
yeah thats cool more the merrier
still in. want me to bring anythign
nah i got food and drinks covered
natalie wants to know if theres vegetarian snacks
yeah hummus veggie chips guac all that
lol ok bet. see yall at 6 tmrw
yo marcus its doug from chem lab sophomore year. saw ur tiktok art stuff man thats sick
yoo doug no way. how u been man
good good working in boston now. we should grab a beer next time im up in burlington
hi is this greg hoffman plumbing
Yes this is Greg. How can I help?
got a leaky kitchen faucet at 47 lakeview terrace
I can come by Thursday between 2-4. $85 service call. Sound good?
Hi Marcus! A package was delivered to our porch by mistake. Says Davis on it. I'll leave it on your step.
dude did u see the uvm game last night
no i missed it what happened
we should catch one at gutterson sometime
Reminder: yard waste pickup is moved to Thursday this week
Also the Hendersons are having their driveway repaved so expect some noise tomorrow
Does anyone have a hedge trimmer I can borrow this weekend?
Lunch at Hen of the Wood Friday anyone?
whos going to homecoming this year
we should do a big brunch or something
Reminder: You have an appointment with Dr. Patel on Thursday, April 3 at 10:30 AM. Reply C to confirm or R to reschedule.
Confirmed. See you Thursday. Please arrive 10 minutes early.
CVS: Your prescription is ready for pickup at CVS #4851, 200 Dorset St, South Burlington. Pickup by 02/27.
T-Mobile: Your bill of $85.00 is due on 03/18. Pay at t-mobile.com/pay or in the T-Mobile app.
Lexus of Burlington: Your 2023 ES is due for scheduled maintenance. Call (802) 555-0712 to book. Reply STOP to opt out.
DoorDash: Craving something? Get $5 off your next order of $15+ with code SPRING5. Order now in the app!
Burlington Electric: Planned outage Apr 8, 9AM-2PM in the Lakeview Terrace area. We apologize for the inconvenience.
Planet Fitness: Hey Marcus! We haven't seen you in 12 days. Come crush your goals! Show this text for a free smoothie.
hey marcus long time. howd the consulting gig turn out? we should catch up soon
Kinney Drugs: Your prescription is ready for pickup at Kinney Drugs, 200 Dorset St, South Burlington.
hey did u save the parking validation from the client lunch last week
yeah i submitted it already. should show up in ur reimbursement
VT Fish & Wildlife: Your 2026 fishing license has been issued. License #VT-2026-04812. Valid through 12/31/2026.
Papa Franks: Large 1-topping + 2 liter just $12.99 this weekend! Order at papafranksbtv.com. Reply STOP to unsub.
Spare Time: Bowl one game get one FREE every Tuesday! Plus $2 shoe rentals. See you on the lanes!
Marcus! I saw your mom at the farmers market and she said youre doing so well at your job. Thats awesome! We should hang out sometime, its been forever.
Hey Marcus, great meeting you at the VT tech meetup last week. Would love to grab coffee and chat about the consulting space.
yeah for sure! let me check my schedule this week
found old photos from your uvm graduation, ill send
easter at aunt linda's — confirmed yall?
garden looks amazing marcus, tomatoes are rocketing
ill come over and steal some
